_comment: HP BIOS profile. TODO: probe DESKTOP-DQ8RGE6 (192.168.1.217, HP Pavilion All-in-One, BIOS F.43) to verify.
probed_on: NOT YET PROBED — based on HP documentation

methods_in_priority_order.description: HP Client Management Script Library — PowerShell module
methods_in_priority_order.notes: HPCMSL is the recommended HP scripting tool. Setting names and values vary by model. Run Get-HPBIOSSettingsList to enumerate.
BCU reads/writes BIOS settings via a .cfg text file. Boot order is typically in 'UEFI Boot Order' section.
WMI approach for HP. Availability varies by model. Class HP_BIOSSetting has Name and Value properties.

methods_in_priority_order.description: Universal UEFI EFI variable manipulation — see generic-uefi.json
methods_in_priority_order.notes: Works on any UEFI system but requires SeSystemEnvironmentPrivilege.

powershell_probe.check_bcu: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\HP\BIOS Configuration Utility' -Filter BiosConfigUtility64.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
